description: Andrew joined the Ministry of Justice as a Non-Executive Board Member on 21 August 2023. He has 25 years’ experience as an executive in technology companies, notably Farfetch where he served as Chief Operating Officer for 10 years until 2020. He is currently Chair of edtech business Twinkl and Non-Executive Director of 1stdibs in the US and Carwow and GetHarley in London. He holds an MBA from INSEAD and a BA Law from Oxford University.

details.body:
Andrew joined the Ministry of Justice as a Non-Executive Board Member on 21 August 2023.

He has 25 years’ experience as an executive in technology companies, notably Farfetch where he served as Chief Operating Officer for 10 years until 2020. He is currently Chair of edtech business Twinkl and Non-Executive Director of 1stdibs in the US and Carwow and GetHarley in London. He holds an MBA from INSEAD and a BA Law from Oxford University.

Andrew joined the Ministry of Justice as a Non-Executive Board Member on 21 August 2023.

He has 25 years’ experience as an executive in technology companies, notably Farfetch where he served as Chief Operating Officer for 10 years until 2020. He is currently Chair of edtech business Twinkl and Non-Executive Director of 1stdibs in the US and Carwow and GetHarley in London. He holds an MBA from INSEAD and a BA Law from Oxford University.

Our Non-executives are senior figures from outside the department who bring a diverse mix of expertise and skills from across the public and private sector. They all:

  • give guidance and advice to MOJ leaders and ministers
  • support and challenge management on the department’s strategic direction
  • provide support in monitoring and reviewing progress

title: Andrew Robb
